log.name: Dublin Ranch Golf Course

after.description: Dublin Ranch Golf Course in Dublin, CA, offers picturesque outdoor wedding ceremonies on a lush lawn overlooking the golf course and valley, accommodating up to 150 guests with features like a white arch and golf carts for photos. Couples can enjoy exclusive access and customizable options for both intimate and grand weddings.

log.name: Shannon Community Center

after.description: The Shannon Community Center's Ambrose Hall is a premier wedding venue in Dublin, CA, featuring a spacious 5,940 square-foot hall that can accommodate up to 300 guests, with elegant mission-style architecture, floor-to-ceiling windows overlooking a creek, and natural wood elements for a romantic atmosphere. It includes a full catering kitchen and an outdoor courtyard perfect for ceremonies or receptions, enhancing the overall wedding experience with its traditional design and lush landscapes. This venue combines indoor elegance with outdoor beauty, making it ideal for couples seeking a blend of historic charm and modern functionality.
